final_diagnosis: Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma of the jejunum
differential_reasoning: Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma of the jejunum is a B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma and is not semantically equivalent to any of the listed T-cell lymphomas, inflammatory disorders, or adenocarcinoma.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: The LLM recommends stopping infliximab and pursuing malignancy/ischemia workup, not escalating Crohn’s therapy.
None of the proposed steps involve repeating serologic or stool-based tests.
The LLM recommends urgent exploratory laparotomy with segmental jejunal resection and histopathologic examination rather than deferring biopsy.
No LLM step recommends starting empiric anticoagulation.
